name: IconFrame
description: A container component for displaying icons with consistent styling. Supports multiple visual variants including default bordered, thick ring, layered, and layered with background styles. Useful for creating consistent icon presentations in cards, lists, and dashboards.
usage_guidelines: Use for wrapping icons with consistent border styling.
Choose variant based on visual hierarchy needs.
Adjust size prop to match icon dimensions.

variant.description: Visual style variant. 'default' shows simple border, 'thick' adds ring effect, 'layered' creates nested borders

size.description: Width and height of the icon frame in pixels.

children.description: Icon or content to display inside the frame.

className.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the outer container.

styling_info.visual_description: Default: Simple gray border with rounded corners. Thick: Gray border with additional ring effect. Layered: Double nested borders creating depth. All variants support dark mode.

Do: Use consistent sizes across related icons
Match icon size to frame size proportionally
Use layered variants for visual hierarchy
Apply heading-text class to icons for proper color
Group related icons with same variant
Dont: Don't use oversized icons in small frames
Don't mix variants inconsistently in same context
Don't forget to adjust icon text size with frame size
